name: Nancy Pelosi
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,374,025 for Nancy Pelosi in U.S. House, CA-11. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,374,025.
